addressed: Replaced f-string SQL interpolation with parameterized queries (%s + tuple) in PostgresEngineSpec.cancel_query and RedshiftEngineSpec.cancel_query
Removed # noqa: S608 suppression comments since parameterized queries eliminate the scanner finding
Added test assertions verifying exact parameterized SQL and tuple parameters passed to cursor.execute
structured_output.reasoning: cancel_query_id flows from user API requests through SQLExecutor._cancel_query into engine spec cancel_query methods, where it was interpolated directly into SQL via f-strings. Both postgres.py and redshift.py had identical vulnerability patterns. validate_cancel_query_id provides upstream validation but defense-in-depth requires parameterized queries at the execute site. Replaced f-string interpolation with %s parameterized queries and int() casting, matching standard DB-API 2.0 patterns.
